== EntitySerializerRegistration.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

internal static class EntitySerializerRegistration
{
    [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    public static void Initialize()
    {
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register<TestNamespace.Kennel>(new TestNamespace.Generated.KennelSerializer());
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register(typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription), new TestNamespace.Generated.AnimalDescriptionSerializer());
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register(typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription), new TestNamespace.Generated.DogDescriptionSerializer());
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register(typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription), new TestNamespace.Generated.PoliceDogDescriptionSerializer());
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register(typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription), new TestNamespace.Generated.HandlerDescriptionSerializer());
    }
}

== TestNamespace_AnimalDescriptionSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class AnimalDescriptionSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        var result = new TestNamespace.AnimalDescription();
        // Look for property 'Name' in both simple and complex properties
        var namePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameSimpleProp) ? nameSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameComplexProp) ? nameComplexProp : null;
        if (namePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (namePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Name = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Name = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Name = string.Empty;
        }
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.AnimalDescription)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            var value = entity.Name;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Name",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Name"] = propertyRep;
        }

        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription),
            Label: "AnimalDescription",
            ActualLabels: new List<string>(),
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for AnimalDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return AnimalDescriptionSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for AnimalDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription),
                Label: "AnimalDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            simpleProperties["Name"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Name",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription),
                Label: "AnimalDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}

== TestNamespace_DogDescriptionSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class DogDescriptionSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        var result = new TestNamespace.DogDescription();
        // Look for property 'Breed' in both simple and complex properties
        var breedPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Breed", out var breedSimpleProp) ? breedSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Breed", out var breedComplexProp) ? breedComplexProp : null;
        if (breedPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (breedPropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Breed = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Breed = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Breed = string.Empty;
        }
        // Look for property 'Name' in both simple and complex properties
        var namePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameSimpleProp) ? nameSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameComplexProp) ? nameComplexProp : null;
        if (namePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (namePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Name = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Name = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Name = string.Empty;
        }
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.DogDescription)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Breed
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription).GetProperty("Breed")!;
            var value = entity.Breed;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Breed",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Breed"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            var value = entity.Name;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Name",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Name"] = propertyRep;
        }

        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription),
            Label: "DogDescription",
            ActualLabels: new List<string>(),
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for DogDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return DogDescriptionSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for DogDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription),
                Label: "DogDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Breed
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription).GetProperty("Breed")!;
            simpleProperties["Breed"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Breed",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            simpleProperties["Name"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Name",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription),
                Label: "DogDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}

== TestNamespace_HandlerDescriptionSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class HandlerDescriptionSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        var result = new TestNamespace.HandlerDescription();
        // Look for property 'Name' in both simple and complex properties
        var namePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameSimpleProp) ? nameSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameComplexProp) ? nameComplexProp : null;
        if (namePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (namePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Name = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Name = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Name = string.Empty;
        }
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.HandlerDescription)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            var value = entity.Name;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Name",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Name"] = propertyRep;
        }

        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription),
            Label: "HandlerDescription",
            ActualLabels: new List<string>(),
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for HandlerDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return HandlerDescriptionSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for HandlerDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription),
                Label: "HandlerDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            simpleProperties["Name"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Name",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription),
                Label: "HandlerDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}

== TestNamespace_KennelSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class KennelSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        // Extracting init-only property 'Id'
        string idValue;
        // Look for property 'Id' in both simple and complex properties
        var idPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idSimpleProp) ? idSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idComplexProp) ? idComplexProp : null;
        if (idPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (idPropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                idValue = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                idValue = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            idValue = Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");
        }

        var result = new TestNamespace.Kennel(
        )
        {
            Id = idValue
        };

        // Set remaining properties with setters
        // Look for property 'Animals' in both simple and complex properties
        var animalsPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Animals", out var animalsSimpleProp) ? animalsSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Animals", out var animalsComplexProp) ? animalsComplexProp : null;
        if (animalsPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract collection value
            if (animalsPropRep.Value is EntityCollection entityCollection)
            {
                var collection = new List<TestNamespace.AnimalDescription>();
                foreach (var entityItem in entityCollection.Entities)
                {
                    var itemSerializer = _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(entityItem.ActualType)
                        ?? _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription));
                    if (itemSerializer == null)
                    {
                        throw new InvalidOperationException($"No serializer found for element type {entityItem.ActualType}");
                    }
                    var deserializedItem = itemSerializer.Deserialize(entityItem);
                    if (deserializedItem is TestNamespace.AnimalDescription typedItem)
                    {
                        collection.Add(typedItem);
                    }
                }
                result.Animals = collection;
            }
            else
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Required collection property 'Animals' is missing or null");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Animals = new System.Collections.Generic.List<TestNamespace.AnimalDescription>();
        }
        // Look for property 'Labels' in both simple and complex properties
        var labelsPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Labels", out var labelsSimpleProp) ? labelsSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Labels", out var labelsComplexProp) ? labelsComplexProp : null;
        if (labelsPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract collection value
            if (labelsPropRep.Value is SimpleCollection simpleCollection)
            {
                var collection = new List<string>();
                foreach (var simpleValue in simpleCollection.Values)
                {
                    if (simpleValue.Object != null)
                    {
                        collection.Add((string)simpleValue.Object);
                    }
                }
                result.Labels = collection;
            }
            else
            {
                throw new InvalidOperationException("Required collection property 'Labels' is missing or null");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Labels = new System.Collections.Generic.List<string>();
        }
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.Kennel)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Animals
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel).GetProperty("Animals")!;
            var value = entity.Animals;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                var entities = new List<EntityInfo>();
                foreach (var item in value)
                {
                    if (item != null)
                    {
                        var itemSerializer = _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(item.GetType())
                            ?? _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription));
                        if (itemSerializer == null)
                        {
                            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No serializer found for type {item.GetType()}");
                        }
                        var serializedItem = itemSerializer.Serialize(item);
                        if (serializedItem is EntityInfo entityItem)
                        {
                            entities.Add(entityItem);
                        }
                    }
                }
                serializedValue = new EntityCollection(
                    Type: typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription),
                    Entities: entities
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Animals",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue,
                RelationshipType: GraphDataModel.GetComplexPropertyRelationshipType(propInfo)
            );
            complexProperties["Animals"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Node).GetProperty("Id")!;
            var value = entity.Id;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Id",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Id"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Labels
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Node).GetProperty("Labels")!;
            var value = entity.Labels;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                var values = new List<SimpleValue>();
                foreach (var item in value)
                {
                    values.Add(new SimpleValue(
                        Object: item!,
                        Type: typeof(string)
                    ));
                }
                serializedValue = new SimpleCollection(
                    Values: values,
                    ElementType: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Labels",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Labels"] = propertyRep;
        }

        var actualLabels = entity.Labels?.ToList() ?? new List<string>();
        var primaryLabel = actualLabels.Count > 0 ? actualLabels[0] : "Kennel";
        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel),
            Label: primaryLabel,
            ActualLabels: actualLabels,
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for Kennel.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return KennelSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for Kennel.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel),
                Label: "Kennel",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Labels
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel).GetProperty("Labels")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.INode).GetProperty("Labels")!;
            simpleProperties["Labels"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Labels",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.SimpleCollection,
                ElementType: typeof(string),
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel).GetProperty("Id")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IEntity).GetProperty("Id")!;
            simpleProperties["Id"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Id",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Animals
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel).GetProperty("Animals")!;
            complexProperties["Animals"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Animals",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.ComplexCollection,
                ElementType: typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription),
                IsNullable: false,
                NestedSchema: TestNamespace.Generated.AnimalDescriptionSerializer.GetSchemaStatic(),
                RelationshipType: GraphDataModel.GetComplexPropertyRelationshipType(propInfo)
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.Kennel),
                Label: "Kennel",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}

== TestNamespace_PoliceDogDescriptionSerializer.g.cs ==
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class PoliceDogDescriptionSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        var result = new TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription();
        // Look for property 'Badge' in both simple and complex properties
        var badgePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Badge", out var badgeSimpleProp) ? badgeSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Badge", out var badgeComplexProp) ? badgeComplexProp : null;
        if (badgePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (badgePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Badge = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Badge = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Badge = string.Empty;
        }
        // Look for property 'Handler' in both simple and complex properties
        var handlerPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Handler", out var handlerSimpleProp) ? handlerSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Handler", out var handlerComplexProp) ? handlerComplexProp : null;
        if (handlerPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract complex value using registered serializer
            if (handlerPropRep.Value is EntityInfo complexEntity)
            {
                var complexSerializer = _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(complexEntity.ActualType)
                    ?? _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(typeof(TestNamespace.HandlerDescription));
                if (complexSerializer != null)
                {
                    result.Handler = (TestNamespace.HandlerDescription?)complexSerializer.Deserialize(complexEntity);
                }
                else
                {
                    throw new InvalidOperationException($"No serializer found for type {complexEntity.ActualType}");
                }
            }
            else
            {
                result.Handler = null;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Handler = null;
        }
        // Look for property 'Breed' in both simple and complex properties
        var breedPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Breed", out var breedSimpleProp) ? breedSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Breed", out var breedComplexProp) ? breedComplexProp : null;
        if (breedPropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (breedPropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Breed = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Breed = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Breed = string.Empty;
        }
        // Look for property 'Name' in both simple and complex properties
        var namePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameSimpleProp) ? nameSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Name", out var nameComplexProp) ? nameComplexProp : null;
        if (namePropRep != null)
        {
            // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
            if (namePropRep.Value is SimpleValue simpleValue)
            {
                result.Name = (string)simpleValue.Object;
            }
            else
            {
                result.Name = string.Empty;
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.Name = string.Empty;
        }
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Badge
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription).GetProperty("Badge")!;
            var value = entity.Badge;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Badge",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Badge"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Handler
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription).GetProperty("Handler")!;
            var value = entity.Handler;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                var complexSerializer = _serializerRegistry.GetSerializer(value.GetType());
                if (complexSerializer != null)
                {
                    serializedValue = complexSerializer.Serialize(value);
                }
                else
                {
                    throw new InvalidOperationException($"No serializer found for type {value.GetType().Name}");
                }
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Handler",
                IsNullable: true,
                Value: serializedValue,
                RelationshipType: GraphDataModel.GetComplexPropertyRelationshipType(propInfo)
            );
            complexProperties["Handler"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Breed
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.DogDescription).GetProperty("Breed")!;
            var value = entity.Breed;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Breed",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Breed"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.AnimalDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            var value = entity.Name;
            Serialized? serializedValue = null;

            if (value != null)
            {
                serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value!,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );
            }

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Name",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Name"] = propertyRep;
        }

        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription),
            Label: "PoliceDogDescription",
            ActualLabels: new List<string>(),
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for PoliceDogDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return PoliceDogDescriptionSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for PoliceDogDescription.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription),
                Label: "PoliceDogDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Badge
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription).GetProperty("Badge")!;
            simpleProperties["Badge"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Badge",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Handler
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription).GetProperty("Handler")!;
            complexProperties["Handler"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Handler",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Complex,
                IsNullable: true,
                NestedSchema: TestNamespace.Generated.HandlerDescriptionSerializer.GetSchemaStatic(),
                RelationshipType: GraphDataModel.GetComplexPropertyRelationshipType(propInfo)
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Breed
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription).GetProperty("Breed")!;
            simpleProperties["Breed"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Breed",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Name
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription).GetProperty("Name")!;
            simpleProperties["Name"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Name",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.PoliceDogDescription),
                Label: "PoliceDogDescription",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}
